block_01: In trading everything matters. There are no such things that you can dismiss as unimportant. The time frame you choose also plays a crucial role and can even determine the outcome of your deals. However, novice traders often struggle to determine the time frame that will suit them best.
block_02: What time frame to use when trading Forex, stocks or ETFs? How to use multiple time frames to your advantage? Find the answers in this article.
block_04: How to Trade a Falling Asset?
block_05: They say “don’t catch a falling knife” for a reason. Chances are, you will end up losing by opening a long position in a falling asset. There are two rules, however, that, if applied correctly, can help you capitalize on falling assets...
block_07: Balance of Power — Identifying Market Sentiment
block_08: Market sentiment is the combined attitude of all traders towards the asset. To a great extent it determines the asset price. Learn to understand what other traders think by using the Balance of Power indicator.
